# Matching-engine reference fixtures

These files were generated by the original Go implementation of the matching
engine (SGP4 verified against the standard Vallado vector for object 06251,
24 tests under `go test -race`), which lived in `sidecar/` before the project
moved to 100% PJSR. The scenario: observer at the satellite's subpoint near
the TLE epoch, 4°×3° FOV centered on the topocentric direction, 60 s window,
the satellite's own reported path fed back as detected trail 0.

- `delta.tle` — the SGP4 verification object (NORAD 06251)
- `request.json` — a complete match request
- `response.json` — the exact response produced by the Go CLI on these inputs
- `propagation.json` — stepwise TEME ECI positions + topocentric RA/Dec

`tests/satmatch.test.js` replays them against the JS engine within documented
tolerances. To regenerate, check out the git revision that still contains
`sidecar/fixtures_test.go` and run `SI_GEN_FIXTURES=1 go test -run
TestGenerateFixtures` there, then the built CLI for `response.json`.
